        # you can also use title

        pos_y = 0

best animated website to put as a background wallpaper

plugin {
    hyprwinwrap {
        # class is an EXACT match and NOT a regex!
        class = kitty-bg
        # you can also use title
        title = kitty-bg
        # you can add the position of the window in a percentage
        pos_x = 25
        pos_y = 30
        # you can add the size of the window in a percentage
        size_x = 40
        size_y = 70
    }
}

# This will toggle HyprExpo when SUPER+g is pressed
bind = SUPER, g, hyprexpo:expo, toggle
